fetch_hrrr_smoke live smoke
  bbox=(-124.0, 41.0, -121.0, 43.0)
  variable=near_surface_smoke
  forecast_hour=1
  cog_bytes=2672
  shape=(63, 94)
  bounds=BoundingBox(left=-124.02061661281054, bottom=40.96779196783017, right=-120.98714612054488, top=43.000862616901834)
  min=9.865e-26 kg m-3
  max=8.000e-12 kg m-3
  mean=1.547e-13 kg m-3
